3297900.name: Tierras Infernales
3297900.description:
An intense action Arcade Roguelike, where creativity and precision are key. 

Set in a dystopian version of the independence wars in northern Argentina, play as an Infernal Gaucho from the “Cavalry” division: Soldiers who fight with heavy weapons mechanical boots that make them unstoppable with the right training. 

Easy to grab, hard to master: Infernal Lands presents simple mechanics, but many advanced combinations and techniques that you will discover through experimentation, and with clues and instructions contained in the random upgrades that appear in each run.
3297900.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
